basics.label: Software Developer
basics.name: Raúl Correia
basics.summary: Experienced Software Developer with over 5 years in AWS-native application development and technical leadership. Specialized in serverless architectures and distributed systems, with deep expertise in SDK development and service migration. Proficient in TypeScript and C#, currently expanding skills in Go to diversify backend development capabilities. Passionate about technological innovation, gaming, cycling, and traveling.

highlights: Led the Asset Management platform using AWS serverless technologies, processing and enriching data for thousands of EV chargepoint sessions monthly
Drove technical direction for the Asset Management API while ensuring Shell's enterprise security standards
Contribute to cross-team TypeScript and AWS service pattern initiatives, aligning with Shell's Recharge cloud governance framework
Performed migration of CI/CD pipelines from GitLab to GitHub, being compliant to Shell guidelines
Established comprehensive monitoring using Datadog and CloudWatch, maintaining 99.9% service uptime
Mentor team members in AWS serverless architecture

work.summary: Backend developer for Business API Team
highlights: Engineered highly available serverless applications handling over thousands of monthly requests, ensuring scalability and reliability.
Implemented complex service migrations to meet Shell's enterprise requirements
Designed error handling and retry mechanisms using AWS SQS and EventBridge
Created automated compliance checking and security scanning in CI/CD pipelines
Optimized AWS Lambda utilization, reducing operational costs
Developed and documented post-mortems during the migration to Shell and shared with the Backend Guild as lessons learned

work.summary: Developer for core multi-tenant KYC/KYB platform
highlights: Developed a multi-tenant serverless platform using AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, TypeScript, and Node.js, supporting multiple banks from a single codebase
Implemented migration from Serverless Framework to AWS CDK v2, reducing technical debt by 50%
Built dynamic configuration system using AWS Parameter Store and Secrets Manager
Implemented comprehensive observability using AWS CloudWatch and X-Ray
Implemented KYC processes, for Germany and Netherlands, from third-party vendors in a asynchronous fashion.

work.summary: Developer for Ostate architectural parametric generation platform
highlights: Developed scalable compute pipeline using AWS EC2 and Docker
Implemented high-performance C++ fluid simulation algorithms with Python bindings for ease of use
Re-architected Ostate project to allow better code scalability and allow non deterministic algorithms

work.summary: Developer on Web team modernization efforts
highlights: Developed features for Uniface Web SDK implementing modern web standards
Implemented end-to-end functionality across low-code platform and C++ backend
Created cross-platform compatibility features for consistent system behavior
Developed and maintained a 30-year-old C++98 codebase.
Developed documentation for new features and APIs
Contributed to the migration of MES from Silverlight to Angular/.NET Core
Development of a high precision module for regulated industries (medical)
Worked on the core team for the next-gen MES product
Developed components for .NET SDK integrating with Worldline Terminals
Implemented multi-threaded event handling system
Built network communication layers supporting multiple protocols
Created error handling systems for payment processing
Contributed to SDK documentation

education.institution: Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto

projects.name: Elderly Home Medicine Ordering System Enhancement
projects.description: Enhanced an existing ticketing system to introduce a specialized queue facilitating medicine orders for Elderly Homes during the COVID-19 pandemic.

projects.name: Codecrafters HTTP Server in Go
projects.description: Developed an HTTP server from scratch in Go as part of the Codecrafters challenge, focusing on low-level networking and protocol implementation.

projects.name: Lambda Component Testing Framework
projects.description: Created a testing framework in TypeScript/Node.js for AWS Lambda functions, enabling direct testing of deployed Lambdas across teams.
